6C. Time-limit to Implement IndustTllIl Entrepreneur Memorandum.- The stipulated lime for laking effective steps shall be three years lind commercial production shall commence within five years with effect from the date of filini the Industrial EnlTqnneur Memorandum with the Central Govel'llmellt, failing which the Industriel Entrepreneur Memorandum shall stand de-recognised as far as provisions of this Order are concerned and the I'crformance guarantee shall be: forfeited: Provided that the: Chief Director (Sugar), Department of Food and Public Distribution, Ministry of Consumer Affain, Fond 'and P¥¥lblic Distribution may, after the expiry of the aforesaid period, give extension of maximum twa years, not exceeding more than a year al a time, in cases invnlving delay due to any unforeseen circumstances beyond control, such as, natural calamities, drought or non-availability of sugarcane traw material) during off season in a year wherein the extended validity period terminates, non-financing of sugar sectors. stay 011 permission for land lise by Ih: ¥
